title: rubus × subtruncatiformis
intro: Rubus × subtruncatiformis, also known as the Black Raspberry or Bramble, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus, characterized by its dark purple fruit and thorny stems. The medicinal properties of Rubus × subtruncatiformis are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and salicylic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × subtruncatiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Rubus × subtruncatiformis can be prepared into various herbal products, such as jams, jellies, teas, and supplements, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
